info.name: APEXIQ API
info.description: Generated from live Nest Swagger docs on 2026-03-13.

item.name: Refresh access token using refresh token
Complete student onboarding — exam, class, goals
Student dashboard — rank, plan, weak topics, streak
Get weak topics with severity and chapter context
Create a battle room and get room code + WS URL
Create a new subject (scoped to tenant)
Get all subjects for this tenant with nested chapters & topics
Get one subject with full chapter+topic tree
Create a chapter under a subject
Get chapters for a subject (sorted by sortOrder)
Create a topic under a chapter
Bulk create up to 100 questions in one transaction

body.raw:
{
    "questions":  {
                      "topicId":  "uuid-of-topic",
                      "content":  "A Carnot engine operates between 500 K and 300 K. What is its efficiency?",
                      "type":  "mcq_single",

                      "source":  "teacher",

item.name: List lectures (role-filtered: student=enrolled batches; teacher=own; admin=all)
Get one lecture with topic and batch
Update a lecture (teachers: own only; admin: any)

body.raw:
{
    "batchId":  "uuid-of-batch",
    "topicId":  "uuid-of-topic",
    "title":  "Laws of Thermodynamics - Part 1",
    "description":  "Covers zeroth and first laws with examples",

                            "timestampSeconds":  300,
                            "questionId":  "uuid-of-question"
                        }
}

query.description: Admin/teacher: specify studentId to view their progress
